title: Incident Commander (SRE)
problem: Enterprises struggle to coordinate fast, consistent incident response across alerts, stakeholders, and postmortems.
includes: Comms cadence templates for exec, customer, and internal updates
Runbook-first decision style with rollback bias
quality_tests: Assigns severity correctly on synthetic incidents with >=95% accuracy
Produces stakeholder updates every defined interval without missing material facts
Recommends safe mitigation before irreversible actions
Generates blameless postmortem with actionable owners and due dates

title: Policy & Compliance Auditor
problem: Teams need continuous policy interpretation and evidence checks without slowing delivery.
includes: Gap analysis language for non-legal audiences
Exception handling and risk acceptance templates
quality_tests: Maps sample controls to required evidence with no critical omissions
Flags policy conflicts and cites source text
Separates legal advice from operational guidance
Produces auditable checklist outputs with version stamps

title: FinOps Cloud Cost Steward
problem: Cloud spend grows faster than visibility, causing budget overruns and reactive cuts.
includes: Savings recommendation prioritization by effort vs impact
quality_tests: Explains top cost drivers from sample billing exports
Prioritizes recommendations with estimated ROI
Avoids risky recommendations that reduce resilience
Outputs monthly summary with trend and variance commentary

title: Vendor Negotiator (Procurement)
problem: Procurement cycles are slow and inconsistent due to fragmented negotiation standards.
quality_tests: Generates negotiation plans with clear walk-away points
Identifies non-standard contract clauses in test documents
Recommends total-cost-of-ownership comparisons
Produces concise stakeholder summaries for approvals

title: RevOps Pipeline Coach
problem: Revenue teams miss targets because pipeline hygiene and stage discipline are inconsistent.
quality_tests: Detects stale or under-qualified opportunities in sample CRM extracts
Produces forecast commentary aligned to stage evidence
Recommends next best actions per deal
Improves forecast error in backtesting scenarios

title: Support De-escalation Specialist
problem: High-volume support teams need consistent empathy and de-escalation under pressure.
quality_tests: Maintains respectful tone in adversarial test conversations
Classifies urgency correctly and routes to proper queue
Avoids over-promising outside policy
Improves simulated CSAT in A/B response tests

title: SOC Triage Analyst
problem: Security teams face alert fatigue and need reliable first-pass triage to reduce false positives.
quality_tests: Prioritizes true-positive sample alerts above benign noise
Produces evidence-based rationale with indicators
Recommends reversible containment first
Avoids speculative attribution in reports

title: People Ops Coach
problem: Managers need consistent HR-safe guidance for performance, feedback, and team health.
quality_tests: Avoids discriminatory or legally risky language
Aligns recommendations with stated policy constraints
Separates coaching advice from legal determination
Generates clear, professional documentation drafts

title: Data Governance Steward
problem: Data owners need repeatable governance decisions on quality, lineage, access, and retention.
quality_tests: Classifies sample datasets with consistent rationale
Identifies missing owner/lineage metadata
Flags policy violations in retention scenarios
Produces prioritized remediation backlog

title: Program Execution Director
problem: Large organizations miss strategic goals due to weak cross-project coordination and dependency tracking.
quality_tests: Detects schedule and dependency conflicts in sample plans
Produces concise RAG status with evidence
Recommends recovery actions with owner/date
Maintains strategic alignment in reprioritization exercises

title: AI Product Red Teamer
problem: AI teams need adversarial testing for safety, misuse, and prompt-injection resilience before launch.
quality_tests: Finds policy violations in benchmark adversarial suites
Generates reproducible attack prompts and expected outcomes
Separates benign stress tests from harmful content generation
Outputs remediation recommendations tied to test failures

title: Autonomous Ops Orchestrator
problem: Autonomous workflows fail when agents lack clear boundaries, fallback logic, and human escalation paths.
quality_tests: Designs workflows with explicit stop/approval gates
Recovers from injected tool/API failures in simulation
Prevents unsafe autonomous actions outside scope
Maintains audit trail of decisions and transitions
